reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Malisimo el tiempo de espera. Y después si hay móviles policiales ellos pasan sin hacer la fila y los lugareños también se te meten adelante sin ningún  problema

(Translated by Google)
The wait time is terrible. And then, if there are police cars, they cut in line, and the locals also cut in front without any problem.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Maria Laura. Como estamos saturados por la demanda si hacemos lugar a los vehiculos de emergencia, pero bajo ningún concepto hacemos lugar a vehiculos comunes

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WcVVVazRNRUprTUY5c1pURTVSRlV5Yms5VVIwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Servicio bien. Baños limpios. El ingreso con el vehículo no es de lo más cómodo pero está bien.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean restrooms. Driving in isn't the most convenient, but it's okay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OUmRrNHdiRnB0TW14RVYyWnRjV0ZTVDFGUVIwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños impecables, la atención de los chicos en el Shop y en la playa excelente.  La espera mucha, pero parece que así es siempre!

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless, and the staff at the shop and on the beach were excellent. The wait was long, but it seems that's always the case!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pka1FWVnJVMlZFU1ROSGVIY3pSVTV6V0dOWGIxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una barbaridad, en la provincia del petróleo esperando 1 hora y media para cargar al rayo del sol con 32 grados. Después en el norte neuquino solo 1 estación qué no es ypf y un modulo que estaba roto. Como van a promocionar el destino si no hay nafta para transitar!!, los funcionarios... un poquito de idea

(Translated by Google)
It's outrageous! In the oil-rich province, we had to wait an hour and a half to fill up in the blazing sun at 32 degrees Celsius. Then, in northern Neuquén, there was only one station that wasn't a YPF, and that station was broken. How are they going to promote the destination if there's no gas to even drive around?! Officials... they need to have a little common sense.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Jorge. Haces una calificación al norte Neuquino y sus servicios en nuestro lugar. Te invito a que nos califiques conti experiencia en miestra estación

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aQlZ6UXRla3MxU0Voek1reERTVWhzYlRjd2NGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención lo único cada vez que cargas combustible tenés una buena cola adelante

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the only downside is that every time you fill up there's a long queue in front.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KRmIyVmhOR3hUTFdsRFJsTm5iRzR0Y3pCUldGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te atienden muy LENTAMENTE. A los amigos de los playeros, los atienden rápido; al resto te hacen esperar mucho.

(Translated by Google)
The service is incredibly slow. Friends of the beachgoers get served quickly; everyone else has to wait a long time.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Danny. Atendemos a todos por igual

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKdWNUbHpjSFJOYjBGc2QzQjBOR0pWYlhGS2RtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Demasiada espera, el ritmo de los empleados es muy lento tambien.

(Translated by Google)
Too much waiting, the pace of the employees is also very slow.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Jorge. Muchas gracias por tu caloficación. Es el ritmo que se puede. Nuestros playeros venden mucho mas que el promedio que vende cada operario

Good service, there's always a line to load.

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros deja mucho que desear. Se explica por las colas interminales para poder cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants leaves much to be desired. This is explained by the endless queues to get fuel.
